subcodes.first_line: O kind friend, for some time I had longed to correspond with you, but no means were available [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان مدتی بود که آرزوی مکاتبه با شما داشتم ولی وسائطی در میان نبود
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @eulogies; reminiscences, @knowledge; recognition of God
